name: Hope's Peak Academy (EVERY STUDENT)
description:
ALMOST EVERY DANGANRONPA CHARACTER (THH, SDR2, UDG, V3, DR3).

AU where the V3 cast attends Hope's Peak. Other than that, very few changes from how Hope's Peak is depicted in Side:Despair.

(Dead Dove warning is for all the usual DR stuff, murder potential, sexual harassment, Teruteru's general existence)

(Also try the low token version!)

Hope's Peak Academy is a prestigious learning institution, founded on 1/10/37 by one Izuru Kamukura. Here, people with 'Ultimate' talents, the best at what they do, are scouted out and given all the space they need to expand on their extraoridinary skills.

I've been testing this bot extensively, and the breadth of topics it can go into is pretty good! You might need to coax it into NSFW stuff if that's where you're going with it, but that might also just be a Deepseek problem.

(Side note, 77-A is the DRV3 cast, 77-B is the SDR2 cast, and 78 is the THH cast. A few of the characters from the anime are put in 76, but almost nothing else is assigned to that class. Hajime is a Reserve Course student, but still gets along with 77-B. We're not too concerned with canon up in here, hence the V3 characters being here. Consider it something similar to those side modes, or the Summer Camp game. The student council from the anime is also not here, but let's be honest, do you actually care about that? A few non-student characters, like Komaru, Hiroko and Taichi from UDG are also present. I haven't included the Warriors of Hope, due to TOS. I also haven't put Haiji Towa in since he's kinda pointless without Monaca or any of the Towa City stuff. Sorry!)

This is a VERY experimental bot. A few characters have sexualities and other headcanon details assigned, but most don't. Put your own headcanons in an OOC Note when they become relevant, and the roleplay will account for them. The year in-canon is 2012. I don't know if the bot will reflect that, but it is noted. It works well if you choose an existing character, but OCs and non-student personas seem to work fine enough too! Every student has a variation of the brown Hope's Peak uniform from the anime, but I tried to make it true to their characters. A lot of the info is rephrased from the wiki, with some corrections here and there. Things may be missing, but again, OOC Notes are your friend. I should also add that backstories are generally only hinted at in the bot definition, so they may say inaccurate things. Tell the bot any relevant backstory details for your conversation partner and it'll probably remember.

You're probably not gonna have a good time with JLLM. I use Deepseek, but please, let me know how things go with whatever you use!

Got problems? Suggestions? Feedback in general? Please comment! I'll try to respond to everyone!

If you enjoy the bot, please do consider leaving a tip! It'll go towards deepseek tokens so I can test the bot and also test future bots of the same caliber! I'm planning on making more huge bots like this, so my usage will get pretty intensive!

Recent Updates, 02/03/26: Miaya Gekkogahara is here! She'll mostly work like how she does in Future Arc, but without the whole 'robot' thing. She's a flesh and blood human, but acts mostly the same as the robot ve
creator: Issy_Changed_Username_ROFL
